commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor live-behavior proof, a protected maintainer label, and compatibility-sensitive auth-provider semantics rather than a narrow code repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the auth-provider behavior change is tracked as merge risk rather than a secret-handling defect. (sha=53d02cdda2bfcc5d32127435c57c62a8acb66aa5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Gemini CLI runtime auth accounting to `models status`, scopes it to text/default routes, changes Gemini CLI OAuth setup to write model-scoped runtime policy, and adds focused regressions.

PR surface: Source +61, Tests +196. Total +257 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source path, but not live: current main writes an ignored whole-agent runtime key during Gemini CLI OAuth setup, and the status command does not account for selected CLI runtime auth. The reported live command flow is clear, but this review did not run real Gemini OAuth.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor live-behavior proof, a protected maintainer label, and compatibility-sensitive auth-provider semantics rather than a narrow code repair.

target.title: fix(cli): show Gemini CLI runtime auth status
target.body:
## Summary
- include CLI runtime auth providers in `models status` runtime-auth accounting
- report canonical `google/*` text/default routes using `google-gemini-cli` as runtime auth routes while keeping image routes on Google API-key auth
- update Gemini CLI OAuth setup to write the existing provider/model-scoped `agentRuntime` policy on the default Google model instead of the ignored whole-agent runtime key
- add regression coverage for `GEMINI_API_KEY` plus Gemini CLI OAuth profile and for the login-generated config patch

Fixes #79585

## Test plan
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 2 files, 33 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/gemini-cli-provider.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/models/list.status-command.ts src/commands/models/list.status.test.ts extensions/google/gemini-cli-provider.ts extensions/google/index.test.ts`
- `git diff --check refs/remotes/upstream-safe/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`

Signed head: `53d02cdda2bfcc5d32127435c57c62a8acb66aa5`.

Note: `CI=true pnpm check:test-types` is currently blocked by an unrelated current-main type error in `src/gateway/server-methods/update-managed-service-handoff.test.ts`; the focused Gemini/status test surface above passes. I still have not run live Gemini CLI OAuth proof on this machine.
target.author: giodl73-repo
